kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"event_name:(public_token_rejected OR auth_login OR auth_login_failed OR auth_register OR auth_register_failed)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}

attributes.description: Support and security events spanning admin actions and auth-token failures.
attributes.title: StudyVault Admin and Auth

attributes.description: Failed requests, auth issues, and application failures for fast triage.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"language":"kuery","query":"event_name:(request_failed OR file_upload_failed OR file_download_failed OR downstream_sync_failed OR public_token_rejected) or request_outcome:(client_error or server_error or exception) or status:failed or status_code >= 400"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
